verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, happy day (Oh, happy day) Oh, happy day (Oh, happy day) When Jesus washed (When Jesus washed) Oh, when He washed (When Jesus washed) When Jesus washed (When Jesus washed) He washed my sins away (Oh, happy day)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, happy day (Oh, happy day) Oh, happy day (Oh, happy day) Oh, when He washed (When Jesus washed) When Jesus washed (When Jesus washed) When He washed (When Jesus washed) He washed my sins away (Oh, happy day)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He taught me how to watch, watch and pray (watch and pray) And live rejoicing Every, every day Every day!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, happy day (Oh, happy day) Oh, happy day (Oh, happy day) When Jesus washed (When Jesus washed) When He washed (When Jesus washed) When Jesus washed (When Jesus washed) He washed my sins away (Oh, happy day)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, happy day (Oh, happy day) Oh, happy day (Oh, happy day)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When He washed (When Jesus washed) When Jesus washed (When Jesus washed) When He washed (When Jesus washed) He washed my sins away (Oh, happy day)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: He taught me how to watch, watch and pray (watch and pray) And live rejoicing Every, every day Every day!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: When I get to heaven Gonna jump up and down At my Lord Jesus Will my star be crowned Leap into heaven That's what I've been told

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Oh, happy day When Jesus washed (When Jesus washed) When He washed (When Jesus washed) Oh when He washed (When Jesus washed)

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: He washed our sins away (Oh, happy day) Wash our sins away (Oh, happy day) He'll wash our sins away (Oh, happy day) Tell ya friend I'm there He'll wash my sins away!
